top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM customers c
INNER JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro' AND y.Consumption > 1000;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM customers c
INNER JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro' AND y.Consumption > 1000;

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID)
FROM yearmonth y
INNER JOIN euro_customers e ON y.CustomerID = e.CustomerID
WHERE y.Consumption > 1000;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) 
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro' AND y.Consumption > 1000;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM customers c
INNER JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro' AND y.Consumption > 1000;

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID)
FROM yearmonth y
INNER JOIN euro_customers e ON y.CustomerID = e.CustomerID
WHERE y.Consumption > 1000;

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT y.CustomerID
    FROM yearmonth y
    INNER JOIN euro_customers e ON y.CustomerID = e.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Consumption > 1000
) AS distinct_customers;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM customers c
INNER JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro' AND y.Consumption > 1000;
